hero.title: A Reflective Harbor, Unforgettable Honfleur
hero.description: Port of Honfleur is located at the edge of the old town on the Normandy coast, just a few minutes' walk from the Vieux Bassin, cafes, and half-timbered buildings. See sailboats and docks by day, reflections and lights by evening—a place where every snap looks like a postcard.

facts.title: QUICK FACTS
facts.plus_code_desc: Short code for positioning, suitable for quick retrieval in navigation apps.

photos.title: Photo Collage: Capture the Port
photos.desc: We prioritize real photos from Google Maps and public travel info to create a 'poster-style' gallery.

reviews.title: Reviews & Experience: Shared Feelings
reviews.desc: We have retrieved the rating and number of reviews from Google Maps. Due to limitations, we provide verified info and direct links here.
reviews.rating_desc: Rating and review count from Google Maps.
reviews.count_desc: A high number of reviews means you can see photos and suggestions from many visitors across seasons.
reviews.cta_desc: We provide direct links to ensure you see the latest and complete real reviews.

reviews_list.author: Gillian
reviews_list.content: Such a delightful town. So pretty with interesting buildings round the marina. Full of restaurants, cafes, art galleries and of course soveigner shops. Saturday morning there is a market. An interesting wooden church is in the centrd. Well worth a visit.

reviews_list.author: simon parnell
reviews_list.content: This is an excellent place to visit. We were on a cruise so only had a day to visit, but it is a pretty place. Lots to do and visit, especially the wooden church (Eglise Sainte Catherine) and the Chappelle Notre Dame de Grace with it's bells. Plus e enjoyed oysters, whelks and king prawns with a drink relaxing looking over the Le Vieux Bassin.

map.title: Map & Directions
map.desc: Use the Google Maps embed code. You can also open the map in a new window for route planning and sharing.
map.tips_desc: The old town of Honfleur is best explored on foot. It is recommended to park in the outer parking lots and walk along the harbor to Vieux Bassin.
map.golden_hour_desc: Evening and blue hour: reflections, lights, and atmosphere are at their peak.
map.photo_spot_desc: Low angles on the building side of the shore make it easier to capture 'water mirror' images.
map.route_plan_desc: Click the button to open Google Maps for real-time navigation and traffic info.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overview_desc: This page explains how this website handles information. This website is a static scenic introduction page, does not provide account registration, and does not require login.
privacy.collect_stats: Access statistics (if enabled): Anonymous statistics that may be automatically provided by the hosting platform (e.g., page views).
privacy.collect_embed: Embedded content: This website contains Google Maps embedded iframes. This embedded content may set cookies or collect usage data by third parties according to their policies.
privacy.use_desc: Information is only used to improve page display and basic operation, and is not used for advertising targeting or sale.
privacy.third_party_desc: Google Maps is provided by Google. Its data collection and cookie policy are subject to Google's terms and privacy policy.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have questions about privacy issues, please contact the technical support email provided in the page footer.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.use_terms_desc: By accessing this website, you agree to these basic terms of service. This website is for informational and travel reference purposes only.
terms.content_desc: The photos on this website come from public sources or the Google Maps location page, and their rights belong to the original authors.
terms.disclaimer_desc: While we strive to provide accurate information, we are not responsible for the absolute accuracy or timeliness of external data (such as Google Maps ratings, business hours).
terms.links_desc: This website contains links to external sites (such as Google Maps). We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of these sites.
terms.changes_desc: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Significant changes will be reflected in the 'Last Updated' date.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.what_desc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to help the website function or provide information to the site owners.
cookies.how_desc: As a static page, we do not set first-party cookies for tracking. However, third-party embedded content (such as Google Maps) may use cookies.
cookies.third_party_desc: Google Maps may use cookies to remember your preferences and provide personalized map features. These are controlled by Google.
cookies.manage_desc: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may affect the display or function of some website features (such as maps).
